2.  **Preload Main Module:** Added `<link rel="modulepreload" href="./index.tsx" />` to the `<head>`. This tells the browser to start downloading your main React application bundle immediately, in parallel with the inline authentication checks. By the time your bootloader calls `loadMainApp()`, the file is likely already downloaded, significantly reducing the delay before the app starts.

      /* Mac Theme Control Buttons Enhancement */

      /* Autofill Style Fix for Chrome/Webkit */

      .container:not(.sign-up-mode):not(.forgot-password-mode):not(.verify-email-mode):not(.two-fa-mode):not(.two-fa-magic-link-mode) .left-panel .content-signin > *:nth-child(3),

      @media (max-width: 870px) {
        .container {
            margin: auto; /* Safe centering: centers if space available, top-aligns if overflow */
            height: 600px; /* Slightly taller for better spacing */
            width: 90%;
            max-width: 450px;
            border-radius: 20px;

            transform: translate(-50%, -50%);

            z-index: 20 !important; /* CRITICAL: Ensure forms are above panels on mobile */

        .container.forgot-password-mode .signin-signup,
        .container.two-fa-mode .signin-signup,
        .container.two-fa-magic-link-mode .signin-signup {

        .container.two-fa-mode .signin-signup,

            padding: 1.5rem 8%; /* Reduced general padding */
            grid-column: 1 / 2;
            pointer-events: none !important; /* Disable clicks on panel background to prevent blocking form */
        }
        
        /* Specific Panel Alignment for Mobile to avoid touching the white form */
        .left-panel {
            grid-row: 1 / 2;
            align-items: flex-start; /* Pulls content to the top */
            padding-top: 3rem;       /* Adds specific top spacing */
        }
        
        .right-panel {

            align-items: flex-end;   /* Pulls content to the bottom */

      /* --- Brand Performance Enhancements --- */
      /* Glassmorphism for Window Headers */
      .windows > header {
        background-color: rgba(241, 245, 249, 0.6); /* slate-100 */
        backdrop-filter: blur(16px);
        -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(16px);
        border-bottom-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.07);
      }
      .dark.windows > header {
          background-color: rgba(30, 41, 59, 0.6); /* slate-800 */
          border-bottom-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.07);
      }
      .windows > header[style*="background-color"] {
          background-color: transparent !important;
          position: relative;
      }
      .windows > header[style*="background-color"]::before {
          content: '';
          position: absolute;
          inset: 0;
          background: inherit; /* This will be the accent color from the inline style */
          opacity: 0.9; /* More saturated color for light mode for better contrast */
          backdrop-filter: blur(16px);
          -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(16px);
          z-index: -1;
      }
      .dark .windows > header[style*="background-color"]::before {
          opacity: 0.7; /* Original subtle effect for dark mode */
      }
      
      /* Window controls polish */
      .window-controls button {
        transition: background-color 0.2s ease, transform 0.1s ease;

      .microchip__core, .microchip__dot {

    <style>
      /* --- Responsive Enhancements & Media Queries --- */
      
      /* 1. Responsive Base Typography */
      html {
        font-size: 14px; /* Base for small screens */
      }
      @media (min-width: 768px) { /* Tablets */
        html {
          font-size: 15px;
        }
      }
      @media (min-width: 1024px) { /* Desktops */
        html {
          font-size: 16px;
        }
      }

      /* 3. Responsive Admin Dashboard Table */
      @media (max-width: 768px) {
        .responsive-admin-table {
            border: 0;
            background-color: transparent;
        }
        .responsive-admin-table thead {
            display: none;
        }
        /* Card container for each user */
        .responsive-admin-table tr {
            display: block;
            margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
            background-color: #fff;
            border-radius: 0.75rem; /* 12px */
            box-shadow: 0 1px 3px 0 rgba(0,0,0,0.07), 0 1px 2px -1px rgba(0,0,0,0.07);
            border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; /* slate-200 */
            overflow: hidden;
        }
        .dark .responsive-admin-table tr {
            background-color: #1e293b; /* slate-800 */
            border-color: #334155; /* slate-700 */
        }

        /* All cells become flex rows */
        .responsive-admin-table td {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            align-items: center;
            padding: 0.75rem 1rem;
            border-bottom: 1px solid #f1f5f9; /* slate-100 */
            min-height: 52px;
        }
        .dark .responsive-admin-table td {
            border-bottom-color: #334155; /* slate-700 */
        }
        .responsive-admin-table tr td:last-child {
            border-bottom: 0;
        }
        
        /* Style the 'User' cell as a card header */
        .responsive-admin-table td[data-label="User"] {
            background-color: #f8fafc; /* slate-50 */
            border-bottom: 1px solid #e2e8f0;
            justify-content: flex-start; /* Align user info to the left */
        }
        .dark .responsive-admin-table td[data-label="User"] {
            background-color: #334155; /* slate-700 */
            border-bottom-color: #475569; /* slate-600 */
        }
        
        /* The label is the '::before' pseudo-element */
        .responsive-admin-table td::before {
            content: attr(data-label);
            font-weight: 600;
            color: #475569; /* slate-600 */
        }
        .dark .responsive-admin-table td::before {
            color: #94a3b8; /* slate-400 */
        }

        /* Remove the label for the header cell */
        .responsive-admin-table td[data-label="User"]::before {
            content: none;
        }
      }
    </style>

      const showVerifyingScreen = () => {
        const rootEl = document.getElementById('root');

          rootEl.innerHTML = `
            <div style="display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; height:100vh; font-family:sans-serif; background-color:#0f172a; color:white; text-align: center; padding: 1rem;">
              <p>🔐 Verifying your secure login link...</p>
            </div>
          `;
        }

        const script = document.createElement('script');
        script.type = 'module';
        script.src = './index.tsx';
        document.body.appendChild(script);

      const handleAuthAndLoadApp = async () => {

        // --- Flow 1: Custom Token from 2FA ---

            console.log("🔑 2FA Magic link detected.");
            try {
                const params = new URLSearchParams(hash.split("?")[1]);
                const token = params.get("token");

                if (token) {
                    await signInWithCustomToken(auth, token);
                    sessionStorage.setItem('isNewLogin', 'true');
                    console.log("✅ 2FA login successful. Setting hash to home.");
                    // Set the hash. The main app will load and see the user is
                    // authenticated and on the correct route.
                    window.location.hash = '#/home';

                    console.warn("⚠️ Path is for verify-link, but no token found.");
                    window.location.hash = "/#/auth";
                }
            } catch (err) {
                console.error("❌ 2FA magic link error:", err);
                alert("2FA login link failed or expired. Please try again.");
                window.location.hash = "/#/auth";
            }

        // --- Flow 2: Standard Firebase Email Link ---
        else if (isSignInWithEmailLink(auth, currentUrl)) {
            console.log("🔑 Firebase Email link detected.");
            let email = window.localStorage.getItem("magic_email");
            if (!email) {
                email = window.prompt("Please provide your email for confirmation");
            }

            if (email) {
                try {
                    await signInWithEmailLink(auth, email, currentUrl);
                    window.localStorage.removeItem("magic_email");
                    sessionStorage.setItem('isNewLogin', 'true');
                    console.log("✅ Firebase Email link login successful. Setting hash to home.");
                    window.location.hash = '#/home';
                } catch (err) {
                    console.error("❌ Firebase Email link error:", err);
                    alert("Login failed. The link may be invalid or expired. Please request a new one.");
                    window.location.hash = "/#/auth";
                }
            } else {
                alert("Could not complete login: email is missing.");
                window.location.hash = "/#/auth";
            }
        }
        
        loadMainApp();
      };
      
      // --- Execution Logic ---
      // Initialize Firebase immediately to check for email link.
      const app = getApps().length > 0 ? getApp() : initializeApp(firebaseConfig);
      const auth = getAuth(app);
      
      const isAuthRoute = window.location.hash.startsWith("#/auth/verify-link") || isSignInWithEmailLink(auth, window.location.href);

      if (isAuthRoute) {
          handleAuthAndLoadApp();
      } else {
          loadMainApp();
      }
    </script>

      /* Mac Theme Control Buttons Enhancement */

      /* Autofill Style Fix for Chrome/Webkit */

      .container:not(.sign-up-mode):not(.forgot-password-mode):not(.verify-email-mode):not(.two-fa-mode):not(.two-fa-magic-link-mode) .left-panel .content-signin > *:nth-child(3),

      @media (max-width: 870px) {
        .container {
            margin: auto; /* Safe centering: centers if space available, top-aligns if overflow */
            height: 600px; /* Slightly taller for better spacing */
            width: 90%;
            max-width: 450px;
            border-radius: 20px;

            transform: translate(-50%, -50%);

        }

        .container.forgot-password-mode .signin-signup,
        .container.two-fa-mode .signin-signup,

        .container.forgot-password-mode .signin-signup,
        .container.two-fa-mode .signin-signup,

            grid-column: 1 / 2;

        }
        
        /* Specific Panel Alignment for Mobile to avoid touching the white form */
        .left-panel {
            grid-row: 1 / 2;
            align-items: flex-start; /* Pulls content to the top */
            padding-top: 3rem;       /* Adds specific top spacing */
        }
        
        .right-panel {

      /* --- Brand Performance Enhancements --- */
      /* Glassmorphism for Window Headers */
      .windows > header {
        background-color: rgba(241, 245, 249, 0.6); /* slate-100 */
        backdrop-filter: blur(16px);
        -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(16px);
        border-bottom-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.07);
      }
      .dark.windows > header {
          background-color: rgba(30, 41, 59, 0.6); /* slate-800 */
          border-bottom-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.07);
      }
      .windows > header[style*="background-color"] {
          background-color: transparent !important;
          position: relative;
      }
      .windows > header[style*="background-color"]::before {
          content: '';
          position: absolute;
          inset: 0;
          background: inherit; /* This will be the accent color from the inline style */
          opacity: 0.9; /* More saturated color for light mode for better contrast */
          backdrop-filter: blur(16px);
          -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(16px);
          z-index: -1;
      }
      .dark .windows > header[style*="background-color"]::before {
          opacity: 0.7; /* Original subtle effect for dark mode */
      }
      
      /* Window controls polish */
      .window-controls button {
        transition: background-color 0.2s ease, transform 0.1s ease;
      }
      .window-controls button:active:not(:disabled) {
          transform: scale(0.9);
          background-color: rgba(0,0,0,0.15);
      }
      .window-control-close:hover {
          background-color: #ef4444 !important;
          color: white;

    <style>
      /* --- Responsive Enhancements & Media Queries --- */
      
      /* 1. Responsive Base Typography */
      html {
        font-size: 14px; /* Base for small screens */
      }
      @media (min-width: 768px) { /* Tablets */
        html {
          font-size: 15px;
        }
      }
      @media (min-width: 1024px) { /* Desktops */
        html {
          font-size: 16px;
        }
      }

      /* 3. Responsive Admin Dashboard Table */
      @media (max-width: 768px) {
        .responsive-admin-table {
            border: 0;
            background-color: transparent;
        }
        .responsive-admin-table thead {
            display: none;
        }
        /* Card container for each user */
        .responsive-admin-table tr {
            display: block;
            margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
            background-color: #fff;
            border-radius: 0.75rem; /* 12px */
            box-shadow: 0 1px 3px 0 rgba(0,0,0,0.07), 0 1px 2px -1px rgba(0,0,0,0.07);
            border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; /* slate-200 */
            overflow: hidden;
        }
        .dark .responsive-admin-table tr {
            background-color: #1e293b; /* slate-800 */
            border-color: #334155; /* slate-700 */
        }

        /* All cells become flex rows */
        .responsive-admin-table td {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            align-items: center;
            padding: 0.75rem 1rem;
            border-bottom: 1px solid #f1f5f9; /* slate-100 */
            min-height: 52px;
        }
        .dark .responsive-admin-table td {
            border-bottom-color: #334155; /* slate-700 */
        }
        .responsive-admin-table tr td:last-child {
            border-bottom: 0;
        }
        
        /* Style the 'User' cell as a card header */
        .responsive-admin-table td[data-label="User"] {
            background-color: #f8fafc; /* slate-50 */
            border-bottom: 1px solid #e2e8f0;
            justify-content: flex-start; /* Align user info to the left */
        }
        .dark .responsive-admin-table td[data-label="User"] {
            background-color: #334155; /* slate-700 */
            border-bottom-color: #475569; /* slate-600 */
        }
        
        /* The label is the '::before' pseudo-element */
        .responsive-admin-table td::before {
            content: attr(data-label);
            font-weight: 600;
            color: #475569; /* slate-600 */
        }
        .dark .responsive-admin-table td::before {
            color: #94a3b8; /* slate-400 */
        }

        /* Remove the label for the header cell */
        .responsive-admin-table td[data-label="User"]::before {
            content: none;
        }
      }
    </style>

      Auth Bootloader: This script runs BEFORE the main React app.
      It handles magic link verification and ensures the user is authenticated
      before the main application logic begins, preventing race conditions.
    -->
    <script type="module">
      import { initializeApp, getApps, getApp } from "https://www.gstatic.com/firebasejs/10.12.2/firebase-app.js";
      import { getAuth, signInWithCustomToken, isSignInWithEmailLink, signInWithEmailLink } from "https://www.gstatic.com/firebasejs/10.12.2/firebase-auth.js";

      const firebaseConfig = {
        apiKey: "AIzaSyBVlOhHgVqBefjb-XKBX6RP39j--jr-0uI",
        authDomain: "bug-portal-htwth.firebaseapp.com",
        projectId: "bug-portal-htwth",
        storageBucket: "bug-portal-htwth.firebasestorage.app",
        messagingSenderId: "219136546989",
        appId: "1:219136546989:web:e43c0bf77f7b08132b8e24",
        measurementId: "G-V7PJ97LWJ8"
      };

      const showVerifyingScreen = () => {
        const rootEl = document.getElementById('root');
        if (rootEl) {
          rootEl.innerHTML = `
            <div style="display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; height:100vh; font-family:sans-serif; background-color:#0f172a; color:white; text-align: center; padding: 1rem;">
              <p>🔐 Verifying your secure login link...</p>
            </div>
          `;
        }
      };
      
      const loadMainApp = () => {
        const script = document.createElement('script');
        script.type = 'module';
        script.src = './index.tsx';
        document.body.appendChild(script);
      };

      const handleAuthAndLoadApp = async () => {
        showVerifyingScreen();
        const hash = window.location.hash;
        const currentUrl = window.location.href;

        // --- Flow 1: Custom Token from 2FA ---
        if (hash.startsWith("#/auth/verify-link")) {
            console.log("🔑 2FA Magic link detected.");
            try {
                const params = new URLSearchParams(hash.split("?")[1]);
                const token = params.get("token");

                if (token) {
                    await signInWithCustomToken(auth, token);
                    sessionStorage.setItem('isNewLogin', 'true');
                    console.log("✅ 2FA login successful. Setting hash to home.");
                    // Set the hash. The main app will load and see the user is
                    // authenticated and on the correct route.
                    window.location.hash = '#/home';
                } else {
                    console.warn("⚠️ Path is for verify-link, but no token found.");
                    window.location.hash = "/#/auth";
                }
            } catch (err) {
                console.error("❌ 2FA magic link error:", err);
                alert("2FA login link failed or expired. Please try again.");
                window.location.hash = "/#/auth";
            }
        }
        // --- Flow 2: Standard Firebase Email Link ---
        else if (isSignInWithEmailLink(auth, currentUrl)) {
            console.log("🔑 Firebase Email link detected.");
            let email = window.localStorage.getItem("magic_email");
            if (!email) {
                email = window.prompt("Please provide your email for confirmation");
            }

            if (email) {
                try {
                    await signInWithEmailLink(auth, email, currentUrl);
                    window.localStorage.removeItem("magic_email");
                    sessionStorage.setItem('isNewLogin', 'true');
                    console.log("✅ Firebase Email link login successful. Setting hash to home.");
                    window.location.hash = '#/home';
                } catch (err) {
                    console.error("❌ Firebase Email link error:", err);
                    alert("Login failed. The link may be invalid or expired. Please request a new one.");
                    window.location.hash = "/#/auth";
                }
            } else {
                alert("Could not complete login: email is missing.");
                window.location.hash = "/#/auth";
            }
        }
        
        loadMainApp();
      };
      
      // --- Execution Logic ---
      // Initialize Firebase immediately to check for email link.
      const app = getApps().length > 0 ? getApp() : initializeApp(firebaseConfig);
      const auth = getAuth(app);
      
      const isAuthRoute = window.location.hash.startsWith("#/auth/verify-link") || isSignInWithEmailLink(auth, window.location.href);

      if (isAuthRoute) {
          handleAuthAndLoadApp();
      } else {
          loadMainApp();
      }
    </script>
    <!-- The main app script is now loaded dynamically by the script above -->
